business.name: PrimeShield Plumbing
business.tagline: Fast, Reliable Plumbing You Can Trust

sample_reviews.author: James Thornton
sample_reviews.text: Absolutely brilliant service from PrimeShield. Called them out for a burst pipe and they arrived within the hour. Professional, tidy and sorted the problem quickly. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah Mitchell
sample_reviews.text: Had a new bathroom fitted and the results are stunning. The team were friendly, kept everything clean and finished ahead of schedule. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Dave Kavanagh
sample_reviews.text: Really honest and reliable plumber. Gave me a fair quote upfront with no hidden charges. Fixed my boiler issue same day. Couldn't ask for better.

brand.usp: PrimeShield Plumbing delivers fast, dependable plumbing solutions across Leeds with transparent pricing and no call-out surprises. From emergency repairs to full bathroom installations, we put quality and customer care at the heart of every job.
brand.hero_headline: Leeds' Trusted Plumbers, Ready When You Need Us
brand.about_paragraph: Hi, I'm the team behind PrimeShield Plumbing, and we've been keeping Leeds homes and businesses running smoothly for years. We pride ourselves on turning up on time, giving honest quotes, and leaving every job cleaner than we found it. Whether it's a dripping tap or a full bathroom refit, we treat every customer's home with the same care and respect we'd give our own.
